questions.question: Compare the objective functions used in deep learning and reinforcement learning to optimize the model's parameters. How do these differences impact the learning process?
questions.hint: Focus on the key differences between the objective functions

questions.question: Explain how the concept of 'local minima' affects the learning process in deep learning and reinforcement learning. Provide examples to illustrate your point.
questions.hint: Discuss the impact of local minima on the convergence of the model's parameters

questions.question: Describe a scenario where deep learning and reinforcement learning would be preferred over pure optimization. Explain the benefits of using these approaches in this scenario.
questions.hint: Focus on the context in which these approaches are more suitable
